title: Whistleblower Dave Grusch Challenges Neil deGrasse Tyson to a Debate!
summary: A brief discussion where Dave Grusch criticizes Neil deGrasse Tyson's dismissive stance on UAP topics and challenges him to a debate alongside Gary Nolan. The conversation focuses on credentialism in science and lack of curiosity from mainstream scientific communicators.

key_claims.claim: Neil deGrasse Tyson has made up his mind about UAP topics and lacks scientific curiosity
Dave Grusch is willing to debate Neil deGrasse Tyson on UAP topics
Gary Nolan and Dave Grusch would debate Neil deGrasse Tyson together
